title: Last of the Redmen
writer: James Fenimore Cooper, Herbert Dalmas, George H. Plympton
actors: Jon Hall, Michael O'Shea, Evelyn Ankers
plot: A retelling of The Last of the Mohicans with just enough changes to qualify for a different title. Major Heyward and Hawk-Eye escort three children of an officer to safety during the French and Indian War. The addition of young Da...
